title: The Garden of Gethsemane
text:
Then — torchlight. Movement through the trees. Dozens of Temple guards, armoured and armed. And walking at the front: Judas Iscariot.

He is close now. Very close. You see his face in the torchlight: resolved, apologetic, terrified.

The garden is silent except for the crunch of sandals on dry earth.

You have seconds. What do you do?
slideshowTexts: Night. The garden smells of crushed olives and cold stone. Jesus is on his knees beneath a gnarled tree, praying alone. The disciples sleep a stone's throw away.

choices.text: Step back into the shadows. Let it happen.
Wake the disciples. Shout to warn Jesus that the guards are here.
Step between Judas and Jesus. Block the kiss. Tell the guards they have the wrong man.
